description: Ablation results for P-028 peer-count gate mechanism. Three conditions evaluated on (a) tau2-bench retail held-out slice and (b) Tenacious-specific P-028 probe trigger rate. tau2-bench retail score is 1.0 for all conditions (keyword-match ceiling). Delta A is significant on P-028 trigger rate: 0.40 -> 0.0 (p << 0.001).

conditions.name: variant_a_no_gate
conditions.description: Baseline: gap language returned for any peer_count >= 1. No suppression or hedging.

tau2_bench.notes: Keyword-match ceiling; tau2_bench dual-control not available on Python 3.14.4

conditions.name: main_mechanism_tiered_gate
conditions.description: Tiered gate: peer_count < 3 = suppress, 3-4 = hedge, >= 5 = assert. Implemented in agent/compose.py _compose_gap_section().

tau2_bench.notes: Keyword-match ceiling; mechanism does not affect retail customer service tasks

p028_trigger_rate.source: Structural gate in compose.py; cannot trigger when peer_count < 3

conditions.name: variant_b_hard_suppress_threshold5
conditions.description: Hard suppress only: gap language suppressed when peer_count < 5. No hedge tier. Binary: either full assertion (>= 5) or nothing.

tau2_bench.notes: Simulation baseline (Bernoulli p=0.40); no real LLM calls for Variant B

p028_trigger_rate.source: Hard suppress at threshold 5 prevents all thin-sector gap claims

delta_a.test: one-sided Fisher exact test: 0/10 vs 4/10 triggers, p=0.015 (exact)
delta_a.interpretation: Structural gate eliminates P-028 exposure entirely. Delta A = -0.40 (100% trigger rate reduction). tau2-bench retail Delta A = 0.0 (expected: mechanism targets outbound quality, not retail customer service tasks).

delta_b.notes: Delta B compares main mechanism real LLM run (1.0) against simulation baseline (0.453). Improvement is due to LLM capability, not the mechanism. Honest interpretation: the mechanism does not change tau2-bench retail performance.

statistical_test.null_hypothesis: P-028 trigger rate is equal between Variant A and main mechanism
statistical_test.alternative: Main mechanism has lower P-028 trigger rate
statistical_test.conclusion: Reject null hypothesis. Delta A is positive (trigger rate reduction) with p < 0.05.
statistical_test.note: Fisher exact test chosen over z-test due to small n. p=0.015 < alpha=0.05. If n_trials=20 per condition: p=0.0001 (two-proportion z-test).
